pages.title: Privacy Policy
pages.body: This standalone clone keeps storefront and admin data locally unless a client connects their own backend. Do not add tracking scripts without consent.

pages.title: Return Policy
pages.body: Return requests can be reviewed by the store team. Products should remain sealed and in original condition unless otherwise approved by support.

pages.title: Terms & Conditions
pages.body: These products are not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent disease. Consult a healthcare professional before starting any diet or exercise program.

pages.title: Global Presence
pages.body: Core Champs references United States, Europe, Middle East, and Asia regional experiences. This standalone site keeps those references as editable content.

products.title: AGMATINE 750MG
products.summary: CORE CHAMPS AGMATINE 750MG As a regulator of nitric oxide synthesis, Agmatine acts as a vasodilator, promoting the dilation of blood vessels. It can enhance blood...
products.description:
CORE CHAMPS AGMATINE 750MG
As a regulator of nitric oxide synthesis, Agmatine acts as a vasodilator, promoting the dilation of blood vessels. It can enhance blood flow, potentially benefit cardiovascular health, and provide support for individuals looking to maintain optimal blood circulation. It enhances muscle pumps and supports recovery from intense workouts.
SUGGESTED USE:
Take as a dietary supplement; mix 1 scoop with 4–6 oz of water or with your preferred pre-workout beverage 20 minutes before the training.
ALLERGEN INFORMATION:
Made in a facility that also processes sesame, eggs, peanuts, tree nuts, fish/crustaceans/shellfish oils, and wheat products.
WARNING:
Do Not exceed the recommended dosages. Consult with your physician prior to use if you are pregnant, nursing, or taking medication. Discontinue use 2 weeks prior to surgery or if you experience rapid heartbeat, dizziness, severe headaches, or shortness of breath. Use only as directed. Do not use if the outer seal is broken. Store at ambient temperature, away from direct sunlight. Always consult a healthcare professional before starting any diet or exercise program. KEEP OUT OF REACH OF CHILDREN.

products.title: BCAA POWDER 7000 MG
products.summary: CORE CHAMPS BCAA 7000 MG BCAAs are essential for muscle growth and repair. Leucine, one of the three amino acids in BCAAs, is particularly important for...
products.description:
CORE CHAMPS BCAA 7000 MG
BCAAs are essential for muscle growth and repair. Leucine, one of the three amino acids in BCAAs, is particularly important for building muscle. Studies have shown that supplementing with BCAAs can help promote muscle growth and reduce muscle breakdown. Intense exercise can lead to muscle soreness and fatigue. BCAAs can help alleviate muscle soreness and reduce muscle damage by promoting muscle protein synthesis and reducing muscle breakdown. CORE CHAMPS BCAA can help enhance muscle growth, reduce muscle soreness, improve exercise performance, and support immune system function.
SUGGESTED USE:
As a dietary Supplement, take 1 scoop (9 gram) with 8–12 oz. of cold water in a glass or shaker cup. Consume during exercise on training days or throughout the day on non-training days.
ALLERGEN INFORMATION:
Made in a facility that also processes sesame, eggs, peanuts, tree nuts, fish, crustaceans, shellfish oils, and wheat products.
WARNING:
THIS PRODUCT IS ONLY INTENDED FOR HEALTHY ADULTS, 18 YEARS OF AGE OR OLDER. Do not use it if you are pregnant, nursing, taking any prescribed medicine or supplements, or if you have a medical condition. Before taking this product, consult a licensed, qualified, health care professional, especially if you are taking any other dietary supplement, prescription drug or over-the-counter medication; or if, you suspect you have or have been treated for, diagnosed with or have a family history of, any medical condition. This product contains caffeine and should not be used in combination with caffeine or stimulants from any sources. Do not use if safety seal is broken or missing.
Store it in a cool, dry place. KEEP OUT OF REACH OF CHILDREN.

products.title: CREATINE 5000MG
products.summary: CORE CHAMPS CREATINE 5000MG CORE CHAMPS Creatine Monohydrate is 100% pure, flavorless, micronized creatine monohydrate with no fillers or additives. Creatine is a naturally occurring molecule...
products.description:
CORE CHAMPS CREATINE 5000MG
CORE CHAMPS Creatine Monohydrate is 100% pure, flavorless, micronized creatine monohydrate with no fillers or additives. Creatine is a naturally occurring molecule in the body that plays a key role in explosive energy metabolism. It helps to drive periods of short burst power output; like the first few reps in a set, or the explosive drive from the starting blocks. During exercise, intramuscular stores of creatine reload ATP molecules, the “energy machines of muscle”, for last between-set recovery. Unfortunately, the creatine produced by the body is available only in limited supply. Supplementing with CORE CHAMPS Creatine Monohydrate helps to supersaturate muscles with rapid-fueling creatine – improved muscle power, explosive strength, and rapid recovery.
SUGGESTED USE:
Take as a dietary supplement, mix 1 scoop to 8-10 oz of water, preferably prior to exercise.
ALLERGEN INFORMATION:
Made in a facility that also processes sesame, eggs, peanuts, tree nuts, fish/crustaceans/shellfish oils, and wheat products.
WARNING:
Do Not exceed the recommended dosages. Consult with your physician prior to use if you are pregnant, nursing or if you are taking medication. Discontinue use 2 weeks prior to surgery or if you experience rapid heartbeat, dizziness, severe headaches, or shortness of breath. Use only as directed. Do not use if the outer seal is broken. Store at ambient temperature, away from direct sunlight. Always consult a healthcare professional before starting any diet or exercise program. KEEP OUT OF REACH OF CHILDREN.

products.summary: CORE CHAMPS GLUTAMINE CORE CHAMPS Glutamine plays a crucial role in promoting overall health and well-being. As one of the most abundant amino acids in the...
products.description:
CORE CHAMPS GLUTAMINE
CORE CHAMPS Glutamine plays a crucial role in promoting overall health and well-being. As one of the most abundant amino acids in the body, glutamine supports various essential functions. It aids in muscle recovery and repair, making it a go-to supplement for athletes and fitness enthusiasts. Additionally, glutamine helps to strengthen the immune system, enhance gut health, and support optimal cellular function. Incorporating a glutamine supplement into your daily routine can provide numerous benefits, supporting your fitness goals and overall vitality. Boost your body's resilience and performance with the power of glutamine.
Glutamine is an important energy source for intestinal and immune cells; it increases protein synthesis and promotes glycogen replenishment.
SUGGESTED USE:
Take as a dietary supplement, add 1 scoop to 8–10 oz of water, your favorite beverage, or pre- or post-workout drinks.
ALLERGEN INFORMATION:
Made in a facility that also processes sesame, eggs, peanuts, tree nuts, fish/crustaceans/shellfish oils, and wheat products.

This specially crafted formula also helps to restore strength, lubrication, and collagen in the joints, which can assist in improving mobility, flexibility, and the overall well-being of athletes.
Support Healthy Joint Function
Promotes optimal Mobility
Reduces Inflammation
Restore Strength & Lubrication

Abundant in omega-3 fatty acids, crucial for optimal health, this supplement offers a wide range of advantages and applications. Incorporating omega-3 fish oil into one's diet can be immensely advantageous for overall health and vitality.

CORE CHAMPS Tribulus is an advanced natural testosterone support that helps regulate hormonal levels and supports male libido. Tribulus is one the most highly researched and studied ingredients, for good reason.
Tribulus Terrestris has been shown to positively affect muscle growth and increase male libido. Natural Testosterone support is the main factor as you get older. Tribulus helps improve natural testosterone at a safe and effective amount. Not only will you start to feel healthier and more aware, but your drive will increase, and your body will return to a sense of normalcy as you continue to use this.

products.summary: CORE CHAMPS 100% WHEY PROTEIN CORE CHAMPS WHEY offers the perfect mix for superior protein quality with great taste. Protein contributes to the growth and maintenance...
products.description:
CORE CHAMPS 100% WHEY PROTEIN
CORE CHAMPS WHEY offers the perfect mix for superior protein quality with great taste. Protein contributes to the growth and maintenance of muscle mass. Proteins are the source of amino acids in the human body. Some of these amino acids are essential, so we must consume them with our foods. Protein delivered from whey is an excellent source of amino acids (for example, BCAAs). Each scoop provides 25 grams of protein packed with naturally occurring BCAAs and glutamine.
Protein is a vital dietary supplement for any muscle-building or weight-loss program, providing your muscles with the necessary fuel for lean muscle-building, performance, and recovery.
SUGGESTED USE:
As a protein supplement, mix 1 scoop (34 g) of CORE CHAMPS WHEY with 8–10 oz of cold water and mix thoroughly in a shaker or blender. For the best results, spread protein usage between several smaller meals throughout the day.
ALLERGEN INFORMATION:
Contain Milk and Soy. Made in a facility that also processes sesame, eggs, peanuts, tree nuts, fish/crustaceans/shellfish oils, and wheat products.
WARNING:

products.title: Core Champs Isolate – 100% Whey Protein Isolate | 2lbs | 30 Servings
products.summary: Build lean muscle and recover faster with Core Champs Isolate, a premium 100% Whey Protein Isolate designed for athletes and everyday fitness goals. Clean, fast-digesting protein...
products.description:
Build lean muscle and recover faster with Core Champs Isolate, a premium 100% Whey Protein Isolate designed for athletes and everyday fitness goals. Clean, fast-digesting protein with smooth taste and instant mixing, available in multiple flavours.
Key Benefits
100% Whey Protein Isolate for clean, high-quality protein intake
Supports lean muscle growth and strength
Helps with post-workout recovery
Low fat and low sugar formula
Mixes instantly for a smooth shake
Suitable for gym, sports, and daily protein needs
Works well in water, milk, smoothies, oats, and recipes
Core Champs Isolate is a high-performance 100% Whey Protein Isolate formulated to support muscle building, strength, and faster recovery. Whether you are training regularly, staying active, or increasing your daily protein intake, Core Champs Isolate provides a clean and reliable protein boost in every scoop.
Choose from a range of flavours while maintaining the same premium protein quality.
Available Flavours
Birthday Cake
Caramel Latte
Choco Peanut Butter
Cookies & Cream
Delicious Chocolate
Smooth Vanilla
Strawberry Banana
Directions
Mix 1 scoop (30g) with 200–250 ml water or milk. Take 1 to 2 servings daily, preferably after workout or between meals.
Who It’s For
Ideal for:
Gym users and athletes
Muscle building and lean gains
Daily protein supplementation
Recovery support
Busy lifestyles needing convenient nutrition
What’s Included
1 x Core Champs Isolate (2lbs / approx. 900g)
Flavour selected from dropdown menu
Storage
Store in a cool, dry place. Keep the lid tightly closed.
